channel.title: Platform-Economics on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Platform-Economics on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: Beyond the Green Premium: The Pragmatic Realities of EV Mobility in Southeast Asia
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A deep dive into the pragmatic realities of EV fleet adoption in Southeast Asia, moving beyond the ‘green premium’ to focus on margin survival, infrastructure moats, and the ‘poverty anxiety’ of the mass market.

item.title: Candor and Kubernetes: How The New York Times Built a $2 Billion Digital Powerhouse
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: The New York Times transformed into a $2 billion digital revenue powerhouse by embracing radical candor, re-engineering its technical stack with Kubernetes, and evolving its monetization strategy from simple paywalls to sophisticated behavioral funnels, offering a blueprint for legacy enterprises.

item.title: Signals: Week 07, 2026
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Decentralizing the ‘how’ while centralizing the ‘why’—navigating governance and complexity in the age of AI agents.

item.title: Signals: Week 06, 2026
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Escaping the rent-seeking trap of tech platforms: why the future of the agentic economy belongs to those who own the protocols.

item.title: Flatpeak: The Missing Layer of the Energy Transition
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Why your EV is flying blind, and how Flatpeak—founded by the architect of M-PESA—is building the ‘Stripe for Energy’ to fix it.

item.title: Moats in the Era of Vibe Coding
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: In a world where AI tools let almost anyone quickly prototype and ship software, traditional moats are eroding. This article explores 8 durable moats for the AI era and maps them to Hamilton Helmer’s 7 Powers.

item.title: Why Our "Free ERP" Failed (& Why AI Changes the Battlefield)
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: We gave Philippine SMEs a free operating system, but they didn’t use it. In this retrospective, I analyze the failure of ERPX through the lens of modern AI architecture and explain why solving the ‘Cost’ barrier wasn’t enough without solving the ‘Effort’ barrier.

item.title: AIrSpace
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Argues that AI risks driving banks toward visual and experiential sameness—‘AIrSpace’—and challenges leaders to preserve differentiation through vision, brand, and execution.

item.title: Asia Pacific Series: Building the Blocks of Embedded Finance
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: John Januszczak joins Chia Jeng Yang of Saison Capital to discuss the mechanics of building financial infrastructure and venture studios in the Philippines.

item.title: Path to Scale
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Strategies for achieving exponential growth in the fintech ecosystem.
